title: frame dad Love Forever Photo Gift for Dad, 4x6 Inch Wood Rotating Floating Photo Frame from Daughter Son
features: 【Wood Material】The rotating photo frame is made of light wood, with unique design vintage wood texture and real glass cover, dustproof or waterproof, anti-fading, not easy to wear, sturdy and durable.

【Easy to Install】The rotating floating picture frame is very easy to install. Simply remove the inner frame, sandwich the photo between two pieces of glass, replace the wooden plug, and secure the inner frame.

【Double-Sided Display】The photo frame adopts a double-sided floating design that can be rotated 360 degrees to display those important sweet memories. Brown picture frame with heart wood pieces, you can record your story by inserting two of your most treasured 4x6 inch photos back to back.
【Fits 4x6 Inch】Wooden picture frame measures approximately 23 x 21 cm, while inserting 2 vertical 6" x 4" (15.2 x 10.2 cm) back to back, it can display pictures, artwork, postcards, photos.

【Thoughtful Gift】The elegant wooden background brings a fresh and rustic style, highlighting the simple and earthy colors of the cute frame. Each gift from the daughter to her dad comes with exquisite packaging, so you don’t need to spend time on the packaging. Give as a gift and show your dad how much he means to you with a heartwarming photo frame.
description: Product Description 1.57 inch thick frame The outer frame is 1.57 inch thick and made of high quality wood for durability Freestanding The thickened outer frame with rustic look allows each frame to stand upright individually 0.04 inch thick glass Perfect for pictures or crafts whose gap between the two panes of real glass is thinner than 1.5mm
